modulePlaceholder.notImplemented: Qaybtan way diyaarsan tahay laakiin weli lama dhisin. Waxaa la raacayaa {task} ee docs/shop-admin-portal-alignment.md.
modulePlaceholder.overview: Maanta, toddobaadkan, bishan — dukaamada oo dhan.
modulePlaceholder.inventory: Alaabta, kaydka, hagaajinta, kayd-yar, kuwa ugu badan, kuwa aan dhaqaaqayn.
modulePlaceholder.setup: Habaynta dukaanka, shaqaalaha, doorka, qaab-dhismeedka, isku-xirka.
modulePlaceholder.audit: Diiwaan la baadhi karo oo dhammaan ficillada dukaankan.
